tools.name: search
tools.description: Semantic search across Japan's government white papers — the Defense White Paper (防衛白書) and the METI Trade White Paper (通商白書). Query in English or Japanese; returns the most relevant sections with source and citation. A single query can span both papers.

findings.title: Generic tool name can shadow trusted tools
findings.detail: Tool "search" uses a generic high-value name. When multiple servers load together, this can intercept calls meant for a trusted server.
